mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PRODUCT_PRICE ( PPRICE_ID, PROGRAM_ID, TYPE_ID, PRICE, USE_YN, REG_DT ) VALUES ( #{ppriceId}, #{programId}, #{typeId}, #{price}, 'Y', GETDATE() )
mapper.select: SELECT PP.PPRICE_ID, PP.PROGRAM_ID, PP.TYPE_ID, PP.PRICE, PP.USE_YN, CONVERT(VARCHAR(19), PP.REG_DT, 120) AS regDt, TT.TYPE_NM AS typeNm FROM PRODUCT_PRICE PP LEFT JOIN TICKET_TYPE TT ON PP.TYPE_ID = TT.TYPE_ID WHERE PP.PPRICE_ID = #{ppriceId}

SELECT PP.PPRICE_ID AS ppriceId, PP.PROGRAM_ID AS programId, PP.TYPE_ID AS typeId, PP.PRICE AS price, PP.USE_YN AS useYn, TT.TYPE_NM AS typeNm FROM PRODUCT_PRICE PP LEFT JOIN TICKET_TYPE TT ON PP.TYPE_ID = TT.TYPE_ID WHERE PP.PROGRAM_ID = #{programId} AND PP.USE_YN = 'Y' AND (NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM PROGRAM_TICKET_TYPE PTT WHERE PTT.PROGRAM_ID = PP.PROGRAM_ID) OR PP.TYPE_ID IN (SELECT PTT.TYPE_ID FROM PROGRAM_TICKET_TYPE PTT WHERE PTT.PROGRAM_ID = PP.PROGRAM_ID)) ORDER BY TT.SORT_ORDER ASC
